raw_consumer_statement:
In XX/XX/year>, unauthorized charges were made on my Macys credit card account issued by Citibank. I did not make or authorize these transactions. 

After discovering the charges, I promptly reported the fraud to the company and submitted a formal dispute. I cooperated fully with the investigation and provided all requested documentation. On XX/XX/year>, the company notified me in writing that my fraud claim was denied and that I was held responsible for the charges, without providing supporting evidence or a detailed explanation of how the transactions were determined to be authorized. 

The disputed balance, approximately {$930.00}, was then referred to a third-party debt collection agency. My attorney sent a formal demand letter to the company requesting clarification and documentation supporting the denial, but the company did not respond. 

Despite repeated attempts to resolve this matter, the company failed to reasonably investigate my dispute or provide the information requested, and collection activity continued on a debt resulting from identity theft.
